videos.title: Investera 100 000 kr — allt på en gång eller månadsspara?
videos.summary_source_text:
Investera 100 000 kr — allt på en gång eller månadsspara? Matematiskt korrekt: investera allt direkt — tid i marknaden är en av de starkaste faktorerna för avkastning. Emotionellt korrekt: sprida ut, eftersom de flesta inte klarar ett 30-procentigt fall som i mars 2020 utan att sälja i botten.

Vår rekommendation: gör både och. Sätt in en del direkt — så stor del som känns bekväm — och månadsspara resten. Då tar du del av tiden i marknaden utan att riskera att panik-säljas ut vid första nedgång.
Mer på rikatillsammans.se — Sveriges största community för privatekonomi sedan 2007.

#rikatillsammans #privatekonomi #investera #månadsspara #indexfonder

videos.summary_source_text:
What Does Tim Cowlishaw Think About The Current State Of The Dallas Stars? | DLLS Stars Podcast Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

The high-level guest list continues to grow on the DLLS Stars Podcast as today we welcome longtime Dallas Morning News sports columnist Tim Cowlishaw into our studios. Tim has been covering sports in Dallas for over four decades at the DMN and has seen the entirety of the Dallas Stars existence since the team moved from Minnesota to Texas in 1993. He was also the Stars beat writer for the Morning News for three seasons, covering our very own Craig Ludwig and the rest of the late ‘90s Stars. We will get Tim’s current take on the state of the team heading into the 2026-27 season, Jason Robertson’s contract status, Jamie Benn’s future and more. We’ll take a trip down memory lane to the Stars of the 1990s and also a rather contentious incident with former head coach Pete DeBoer during the 2024 Western Conference Final.

videos.summary_source_text:
Förnya ditt ekonomisystem snabbt med PwC:s Finance Ready Snabb implementering av skalbart ekonomisystem 
För CFO:er i både privata företag och offentliga organisationer och myndigheter är behoven tydliga: en effektiv omställning av ekonomifunktionen utan att behöva begränsa eller anpassa sig till gamla affärssystem.  
 
Bra data är avgörande för att kunna driva innovation, effektivisering och verkligt affärsvärde. PwC:s Finance Ready erbjuder en framtidssäkrad ekonomifunktion – byggd på färdigpaketerade ERP‑lösningar från SAP och Microsoft, snabbt på plats och redo att skala.
 
Se filmen där PwC:S Lena Ytterberg och Karl Appelqvist enkelt och kortfattat förklarar vad det handlar om.

videos.title: 21.5: Slafkovsky stays scorching hot with 3-point game! 🇸🇰⭐
videos.summary_source_text:
21.5: Slafkovsky stays scorching hot with 3-point game! 🇸🇰⭐ Juraj Slafkovsky and the Canadiens simply cannot be contained! The Slovak star contributes 3 points in Montreal's 6-2 win over Carolina in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Final, tallying 2 goals and an assist. The goals are Slafkovsky's 5th and 6th of these Stanley Cup Playoffs, making him the first Slovak player with at least 5 goals in a single postseason since Marian Gaborik, who had 14 goals in 2014. Slafkovsky's outstanding offensive performance earns him both 1st star of the game and Top European Player of the Night honors!

videos.title: UK | 21st May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 21st May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Unboxing IFRS 18 – En introduktion
videos.summary_source_text:
Unboxing IFRS 18 – En introduktion IFRS 18 Presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter är här – och ställer nya krav på alla företag som tillämpar IFRS.

Den nya standarden för presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter ersätter IAS 1 Utformning av finansiella rapporter och ska tillämpas för räkenskapsår som börjar 1 januari 2027 eller senare, inklusive jämförelseinformation. Det innebär att vi redan nu befinner oss i jämförelseperioden som ska inkluderas i kvartalsrapporter och årsredovisning avseende 2027.

IFRS 18 innebär bland annat en ny struktur i resultaträkningen, förtydligade principer kring aggregering och disaggregering samt nya upplysningskrav – inte minst kring så kallade Management-defined Performance Measures (MPMs). Även om fokus ofta hamnar på presentation, sträcker sig effekterna betydligt längre – till processer, system, nyckeltal och dialogen med marknaden.

Men var börjar man – och vad bör man ha koll på redan nu?

I samband med lanseringen av vår nya LinkedIn Live-serie Unboxing IFRS 18 bjuder vi in Cecilia Nordenadler och Lisa Sagström – båda redovisningsspecialister på PwC med inriktning på IFRS till det första avsnittet. Tillsammans med moderator Mian Heldesten, rådgivare inom finansiell rapportering, går vi igenom vad standarden innebär, vilka de stora nyheterna är och vad bolag bör göra för att komma igång.

I serien djupdyker vi löpande i specifika områden tillsammans med olika gäster som delar sina perspektiv och praktiska erfarenheter. Oavsett om du just börjat bekanta dig med IFRS 18 eller är mitt i implementeringen kommer du att få med dig värdefulla insikter och praktiska takeaways som underlättar ditt arbete.

Läs mer på: https://www.pwc.se/ IFRS 18 Presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter är här – och ställer nya krav på alla företag som tillämpar IFRS.

Även om fokus ofta hamnar på presentation, sträcker sig effekterna betydligt längre – till processer, system, nyckeltal och dialogen med marknaden.

I serien djupdyker vi löpande i specifika områden tillsammans med olika gäster som delar sina perspektiv och praktiska erfarenheter. videos.title: How the Broncos' 1st-Round-Less Draft Haul Compares to the rest of the AFC
videos.summary_source_text:
How the Broncos' 1st-Round-Less Draft Haul Compares to the rest of the AFC The Denver Broncos navigated the 2026 NFL Draft without a first-round pick, and the DNVR Draft crew is breaking down how George Paton and Sean Payton’s strategy compares to the rest of the AFC. 
In this episode, we evaluate Denver’s rookie haul against other AFC heavyweights like Buffalo, Cincinnati, and Jacksonville who were also sidelined during round one. We unpack the blockbuster trades that reshaped the Broncos' draft capital, detailing how this front office consistently finds future starters on day two and beyond. 
Our crew looks back at legendary team history, analyzing how previous drafts in 1995 and 2012 proved you can build a championship core without day-one picks. 
Join Jake Schwanitz, Henry Chisholm and Andre Simone all things on the Denver Broncos, college football and the NFL Draft.

1:00 - Welcome In 
5:30 - Day Two Value
16:36 - Common Draft Themes
19:15 - Highest Potential From 2026 Draft

videos.title: Eastern Conference Final Preview + Vegas Steals Game 1 in Colorado | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Eastern Conference Final Preview + Vegas Steals Game 1 in Colorado | Daily Faceoff Live The Western Conference Final is underway as the Vegas Golden Knights steal home ice from the Colorado Avalanche after holding off a late push to take Game 1. We break down what went right for Vegas, whether Colorado should be concerned, and the biggest turning points from the opener.

Plus, with the Eastern Conference Final about to begin, we dive into the key matchups and X-factors for the Montreal Canadiens and Carolina Hurricanes. What does each team need to do to punch their ticket to the Stanley Cup Final?

We also continue our offseason preview series with a deep look at the San Jose Sharks and how they can finally take a meaningful step forward next season. From roster needs to young talent and possible offseason targets, we map out the path ahead.

Then David Pagnotta joins the show for The Insider Notebook with updates on Alex Tuch, Scott Laughton, the Calgary Flames looking to move up, and more offseason buzz around the NHL.

videos.title: The Hockey World Went Into Overreaction Overload After the Avs Game 1 Loss
videos.summary_source_text:
The Hockey World Went Into Overreaction Overload After the Avs Game 1 Loss Colorado Avalanche’s struggles spark overreactions after Game 1 loss to Vegas Golden Knights. Are Nathan MacKinnon and company really in trouble, or is it just playoff noise? Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson debate whether execution, not Vegas’ dominance, determined the outcome, and dissect what went wrong for the league’s top-scoring team—including Scott Wedgewood’s performance in net and key absences like Cale Makar.

The episode spotlights how analytics and heat maps may tell a misleading story about the Avalanche’s efforts, and questions whether Vegas’ win was a product of structure or simply capitalizing on Colorado’s mistakes. Listeners get insider takes on playoff overreactions, media narratives, and why Carter Hart’s goaltending gives Vegas confidence. Plus, thoughts from the Subtext Crew, potential returns from injury, and what changes the Avalanche must make heading into Game 2. Can Colorado bounce back and reclaim control of the series?

Plus, thoughts from the Subtext Crew, potential returns from injury, and what changes the Avalanche must make heading into Game 2. Can Colorado bounce back and reclaim control of the series?

videos.summary_source_text:
Conference Final Curse | Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3, Episode 133 — Morning Cuppa Hockey with Jonny Lazarus and Special Guest Co-Host Arthur Staple. 

Jonny and Arthur open the show with a full Game 1 recap — Montreal stuns the Carolina Hurricanes with a 6-2 victory. 

TVA Sports insider Renaud Lavoie joins the show to break down Montreal's dominant 6-2 Game 1 win over Carolina… and what it means for a Canadiens squad that's been battle-tested through 14 playoff games while the Canes were sitting at home.

Then Cory Lavalette brings the Carolina perspective — what went wrong for an 8-0 team that got blown out in their first real test, and whether the Hurricanes can bounce back in Game 2.

Don't miss a second of the daily hockey talk!

videos.title: You Might Be Destroying Healthy Food
videos.summary_source_text:
You Might Be Destroying Healthy Food Fasting is not just about eating less, it is also about how the food is prepared. High heat cooking methods like frying, grilling, and charring can create inflammatory compounds that place extra stress on the body. Gentler cooking methods, like steaming, slow cooking, and moist heat, help preserve the food while reducing that inflammatory load. Sometimes the difference is not only what is eaten, but whether the food was nourished or destroyed before it ever reached the plate.

This is a clip form my video "How to Fast for Different Goals"

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | THE CJ CUP | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | THE CJ CUP | 2026 Check out the best shots of the day from Round 1 of the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson, featuring Taylor Moore, Brooks Koepka, and Emiliano Grillo, among others.

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

videos.title: Why Avs' Game 1 Loss vs Vegas was FRUSTRATING but VERY Fixable | Film Room
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Avs' Game 1 Loss vs Vegas was FRUSTRATING but VERY Fixable | Film Room After the Colorado Avalanche’s 4-2 Game 1 loss to the Vegas Golden Knights in the Western Conference Final, we break down exactly what went wrong in this Avs Film Room and why the problems are still very fixable. From blown defensive reads and lost coverage through the middle of the ice to the small details that created Vegas’ biggest chances, this video shows where Colorado failed and how they can adjust before Game 2. We also break down key moments involving Josh Manson, Artturi Lehkonen, Brent Burns, Scott Wedgewood, and Valeri Nichushkin as the Avs look to bounce back in this huge playoff series.

videos.title: Inside the Broncos Draft Process | The Walkthru with Jake & Nate
videos.summary_source_text:
Inside the Broncos Draft Process | The Walkthru with Jake & Nate The 2026 Denver Broncos season is officially underway 🟠🔵

Jake Plummer and the crew got rare behind-the-scenes access to the Broncos’ draft process and leadership meetings — and they’re breaking down EVERYTHING they learned.

🏈 Why Sean Payton values multi-sport athletes
🏈 What Bo Nix must improve during his ankle rehab
🏈 How Davis Webb could change Denver’s offense
🏈 Why timing and anticipation matter more than arm strength
🏈 What makes a great NFL tight end and pass-protecting RB

videos.title: Boston Dynamics’ New Upgraded ATLAS Just Went BEAST MODE
videos.summary_source_text:
Boston Dynamics’ New Upgraded ATLAS Just Went BEAST MODE Boston Dynamics just revealed a major Atlas upgrade. The new Atlas can lift a loaded mini-fridge, handle shifting weight, and move its body in ways humans physically cannot. At the same time, Unitree’s G1 is responding to live voice commands, while Gatsby is testing humanoid robots as on-demand home cleaners. Humanoid robots are no longer just doing impressive demos. They are starting to move into real work.

✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

Unitree G1 responds to live voice commands in real time

This is bigger than another robot demo. Atlas is now being trained for physical work with heavy, awkward objects, shifting weight, and real-world uncertainty. Unitree is pushing humanoids toward voice-controlled actions, while Gatsby is testing a service model where people book robots for home cleaning. Factories, warehouses, and homes may be the first real battlegrounds for humanoid robots.

videos.title: How To Flip The Puck Over Your Opponent's Stick
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Flip The Puck Over Your Opponent's Stick The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Baldy on Sean Payton's Legacy if Broncos Win Super Bowl, David Webb Play-Calling Expectations & More
videos.summary_source_text:
Baldy on Sean Payton's Legacy if Broncos Win Super Bowl, David Webb Play-Calling Expectations & More NFL Network analyst Brian Baldinger joins the show to break down Sean Payton’s legacy if the Denver Broncos win the Super Bowl, what Davis Webb’s promotion means for Denver’s offense, and why the Broncos’ brutal early schedule could shape their entire 2026 season. Davis Webb was officially named Denver’s offensive coordinator on February 2, 2026, and Sean Payton later confirmed Webb will take over play-calling duties, making this a huge year for the Broncos offense and Bo Nix’s development. Baldy also weighs in on realistic expectations for Denver’s playoff push, Von Miller’s case for jersey-retirement honors, and the under-the-radar Broncos names fans should watch heading into OTAs.

videos.summary_source_text:
Bedard's next deal could change EVERYTHING + Nemec Trade Request? | DFO Rundown Insider Edition The NHL offseason rumour mill is heating up on this episode of DFO Rundown Insider Edition with Irfaan Gaffar and David Pagnotta. The guys break down the latest coaching updates around the league, including the the Los Angeles Kings’ ongoing coaching search and changes behind the Boston Bruins bench.. They also discuss how these coaching decisions could impact pending UFAs and roster construction heading into the summer.

Plus, the latest on Connor Bedard contract negotiations with the Chicago Blackhawks, Simon Nemec trade speculation in New Jersey, the Philadelphia Flyers’ offseason priorities, and what’s next for the Washington Capitals after signing Timothy Liljegren.

videos.title: Puffy Eyes and Face? Do This for 30 Seconds | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Puffy Eyes and Face? Do This for 30 Seconds | Dr. Mandell Do puffy eyes and under-eye bags make you look older, more tired, or swollen in the morning? Before spending money on expensive creams, patches, or cosmetic procedures, try this simple technique with me. In this video, I show you how gentle lymphatic drainage may help reduce fluid retention under the eyes by encouraging your body’s natural drainage pathways to work more efficiently. You’ll learn the physiology behind why fluid can collect under the eyes, how sodium, poor sleep, allergies, sinus congestion, mouth breathing, alcohol, and inflammation can make puffiness worse, and a simple step-by-step technique you can try immediately on one side of your face to compare the difference. Your lymphatic system has no central pump like your heart, so movement and gentle stimulation can make a difference. If your puffiness is related to trapped fluid, you may notice a visible change. Watch, try it with me, and compare both sides for yourself.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: UK | 21st May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 21st May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Almost No Golfer Knows This Move (But It’s the Key to Compression)
videos.summary_source_text:
Almost No Golfer Knows This Move (But It’s the Key to Compression) https://hackmotion.com/affiliates/alex/?aff=198&utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=alexelliott&utm_content=pp&utm_term=21_05_2026

Most golfers try to compress their irons by hitting down harder… but that’s not what creates a pure strike.

Join my whatsapp channel to recieve tips, drills, PDF guides and so much more https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8Q6rHG3R3bSfYTJx2q

Most golfers try to compress their irons by hitting down harder… but that’s not what creates a pure strike.

In this video, I’ll show you the real key to compressing your irons consistently the same move I teach golfers of all levels to improve strike, contact, and ball flight fast. 

You’ll learn:

How to properly compress your irons
What actually creates that clean, powerful strike
The biggest mistake stopping golfers from compressing the ball
A simple drill to improve your iron strike instantly
How to create better contact with every club in the bag

If you struggle with thin shots, heavy strikes, weak contact, or inconsistent iron play, this lesson will completely change how you think about impact.

Master this move, and you’ll start striking your irons cleaner, lower, and more powerfully than ever before.

videos.title: Brooks Koepka shoots 8-under 63 | Round 1 Highlights | THE CJ CUP | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Brooks Koepka shoots 8-under 63 | Round 1 Highlights | THE CJ CUP | 2026 In the opening round of the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson, Brooks Koepka shoots 8-under 63 at TPC Craig Ranch.

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

videos.title: Marner's Playoff Surge, Vegas Takes Game 1 & Habs vs Canes Preview ft. Erin Ambrose & Greg Wyshynski
videos.summary_source_text:
Marner's Playoff Surge, Vegas Takes Game 1 & Habs vs Canes Preview ft. Erin Ambrose & Greg Wyshynski Jeff Marek and Greg Wyshynski break down a massive night around the Stanley Cup Playoffs as the Vegas Golden Knights take Game 1 against the Colorado Avalanche and shift the conversation around the Western Conference Final. The guys dive into Nathan MacKinnon’s dominant performance, his postgame frustration, Cale Makar’s absence, and why Vegas looked so locked in defensively. They also discuss Mitch Marner’s incredible playoff run and why his game looks different in Vegas compared to his time in Toronto. Then they preview Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Final between the Montreal Canadiens and Carolina Hurricanes, touching on Carolina’s lengthy layoff, Montreal’s momentum, Lane Hutson, Frederik Andersen, and early Conn Smythe conversations. Plus, newly crowned Walter Cup champion Aaron Ambrose joins the show after Montreal Victoire captured the championship to discuss the celebration, Marie-Philip Poulin, and the growth of women's hockey.

videos.title: Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open Tune in to all the best moments from Round One of the 2026 Soudal Open at Rinkven International Golf Club in Belgium. The day featured eagle hole-outs, a hole-in-one and plenty of birdies. Leading the way at 8-under is Zander Lombard, with Jacob Skov Olesen and Richard Sterne just one shot back, while 10 players sit tied at 5-under.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

After a break for the US PGA Championship last week, the European Swing resumes with the second of six events across the continent and the first of five consecutive national opens on the DP World Tour schedule as the Tour returns to Belgium for the Soudal Open. While this event can trace its roots back well over 100 years, this week sees the 20th time it has been part of the DP World Tour schedule. First played in 1910 and won by 1907 Open champion Arnaud Massy, it would be played every year until 1958 barring breaks for the two World Wars. Local star Thomas Detry is likely to be the headline act this week as he, almost unbelievably, searches for his first DP World Tour win after five runner-up finishes.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour
► TWITTER https://twitter.com/DPWorldTour
► INSTAGRAM https://www.instagram.com/dpworldtour/ Tune in to all the best moments from Round One of the 2026 Soudal Open at Rinkven International Golf Club in Belgium. The day featured eagle hole-outs, a hole-in-one and plenty of birdies. Leading the way at 8-under is Zander Lombard, with Jacob Skov Olesen and Richard Sterne just one shot back, while 10 players sit tied at 5-under.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

After a break for the US PGA Championship last week, the European Swing resumes with the second of six events across the continent and the first of five consecutive national opens on the DP World Tour schedule as the Tour returns to Belgium for the Soudal Open. While this event can trace its roots back well over 100 years, this week sees the 20th time it has been part of the DP World Tour schedule. First played in 1910 and won by 1907 Open champion Arnaud Massy, it would be played every year until 1958 barring breaks for the two World Wars. Local star Thomas Detry is likely to be the headline act this week as he, almost unbelievably, searches for his first DP World Tour win after five runner-up finishes.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour
► TWITTER https://twitter.com/DPWorldTour
► INSTAGRAM https://www.instagram.com/dpworldtour/

▪ 75 % av aktiva aktiefonder i Europa slog inte sitt index 2025
▪ 85 % av Sverige-fonder underpresterade 2025
▪ 98 % av globalfonder i euro underpresterade på 10 år
▪ 100 % av nordiska aktiefonder underpresterade S&P Nordic BMI på 10 år

Och 2025 var faktiskt en gynnsam marknad för aktiv förvaltning — hög spridning, låg korrelation. Tre av fyra förlorade ändå.

videos.title: How To ACTUALLY Do Lunges (Feat. The “Rock”)
videos.summary_source_text:
How To ACTUALLY Do Lunges (Feat. The “Rock”) If you stopped doing lunges because the balance requirement keeps you from using enough weight to actually build your legs, you’re going to love this fix. Whether you’re doing dumbbell lunges or barbell lunges, the way you step makes all the difference.

The biggest mistake people make on lunges is keeping their feet too narrow. They think every step has to move straight forward or straight back on a tightrope. The problem is, the second you add any meaningful weight, that narrow base of support makes balance almost impossible.

Watch Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson perform walking dumbbell lunges in this clip and pay attention to where his feet land. He doesn’t just step straight ahead. He steps up and slightly out with every rep. By the time he reaches the bottom of the lunge, his feet are several inches wider apart, giving him a much stronger base to push from.

That one adjustment can completely change the exercise.

The dumbbell lunge and barbell lunge are two of the best leg exercises you can do, but too many people abandon them for machines because they feel unstable. That’s a mistake. Lunges give you unilateral leg strength, athletic carryover, glute and quad development, and a benefit you simply don’t get from relying only on squat patterns.

Once you fix your balance, I’d suggest starting with reverse lunges whenever possible, especially if you deal with knee tendonitis or anterior knee pain. Reverse lunges tend to be more knee-friendly than forward lunges because they usually create less forward stress at the knee.

If you do perform forward lunges, don’t slide or reach the foot low into the ground. Step up, then place the foot down from above. As you’ll see in the full video linked to this Short, The Rock does exactly that. This helps reduce shearing stress on the knee while keeping the movement strong and controlled.

Fix the step, widen the base, and suddenly lunges stop feeling like a balance test and start feeling like the powerful leg builder they were always supposed to be.

For more tips on how to build muscle and get bigger legs, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

Varför kommer Volvo EX60 bli en succé? Därför! Podd med Alrik & Felix Avsnitt två av Podden "Varför? – Därför!" där jag och Felix Björklund på tidningen Ny Teknik djupdyker ett ett spännande ämne. 
Eftersom vi båda kört nya Volvo EX60 var valet för dagens avsnitt rätt enkelt.
Alrik och Felix djupdyker i nya Volvo EX60 efter de första provkörningarna. Kommer den att lyckas axla manteln efter storsäljaren XC60? Vi analyserar kördynamik, plattformsteknik, användarvänlighet och sätter fingret på det som skaver – från brist på fysiska knappar till mjukvaruproblem och den tuffa globala marknaden.

Jonny and Colby open the show with a full Game 1 recap — Vegas stuns Colorado 4-2 without Cale Makar in the lineup… what does it mean for the series?

Avalanche beat reporter Jesse Montano of Guerilla Sports then joins the show to break down the damage and what Colorado needs to do to respond in Game 2.

Carolina Hurricanes reporter Adam Gold of 99.9 The Fan in Raleigh rounds out the show with everything you need to know ahead of Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Final tomorrow night.

Is it a Budget Masterpiece or an Outdoor Flop? LM1 Real Review The Shot Scope LM1 accuracy test will shock you… Is it a budget masterpiece or an outdoor flop? 

In this video, we put the ultra-affordable, pocket-sized Shot Scope LM1 launch monitor through its paces to find out the absolute truth. No subscription fees, a built-in display, and an amazing price point make it look like a game-changer—but there is a massive catch you need to know before you buy it. 

We threw the LM1 up against the industry gold standard, the GC Quad, in a head-to-head battle both indoors and out on the golf course. The data split was unbelievable. Indoors, this tiny Doppler radar is an absolute genius, matching the premium data within a couple of yards. But once you take it outside into the wind? The accuracy claims face a serious reality check. 

Watch to see the exact numbers, find out how it compares to the FlightScope Mevo Gen 2, SkyTrak, and The Stack System, and learn whether this device will revolutionise your practice net or end up gathering dust in the corner of your room.

videos.title: Har DU känt Mellanförskap: Känslan när man inte hör hemma eller passar in!
videos.summary_source_text:
Har DU känt Mellanförskap: Känslan när man inte hör hemma eller passar in! Har du någonsin känt att du inte riktigt passar in någonstans? 🥺 Så har jag känt nästan hela mitt liv och det finns faktiskt ett ord för det där. Mellanförskap
I den här nya serien ”Filip Tänker Högt” tar jag upp tankar och funderingar i mitt huvud. 

Mellanförskap handlar egentligen om känslan av att stå mellan två världar utan att riktigt känna att man passar in fullt ut i någon av dem och jag tror länge att jag såg det som en svaghet. Men idag ser jag det mer som att jag fått flera perspektiv istället.

Här är lite insikter och sammanfattning från videon:
-Det tog lång tid innan jag förstod att jag inte behövde välja en sida. Jag fick skapa min egen identitet istället.

Det som gjorde att jag kände mig annorlunda när jag var yngre är nog också det som gjort mig till den jag är idag.
Man behöver inte passa perfekt in i ett fack för att höra hemma.

Det är okej att vara lite mitt emellan. Det betyder inte att man är mindre hel.

Jag tror många spenderar mycket energi på att försöka passa in, när det egentligen är våra olikheter som gör oss intressanta.

Man blir väldigt bra på att förstå människor när man själv vet hur det känns att känna sig utanför.

Det tog tid innan jag förstod att jag inte behövde välja mellan två identiteter. Jag fick bygga min egen. 

idag försöker jag inte passa in lika mycket längre. Jag försöker bara vara Filip. Har du någonsin känt att du inte riktigt passar in någonstans? 🥺 Så har jag känt nästan hela mitt liv och det finns faktiskt ett ord för det där. Mellanförskap
I den här nya serien ”Filip Tänker Högt” tar jag upp tankar och funderingar i mitt huvud. 

Mellanförskap handlar egentligen om känslan av att stå mellan två världar utan att riktigt känna att man passar in fullt ut i någon av dem och jag tror länge att jag såg det som en svaghet. Men idag ser jag det mer som att jag fått flera perspektiv istället.

Här är lite insikter och sammanfattning från videon:
-Det tog lång tid innan jag förstod att jag inte behövde välja en sida. Jag fick skapa min egen identitet istället.

Det som gjorde att jag kände mig annorlunda när jag var yngre är nog också det som gjort mig till den jag är idag.
Man behöver inte passa perfekt in i ett fack för att höra hemma.

Det är okej att vara lite mitt emellan. Det betyder inte att man är mindre hel.

Jag tror många spenderar mycket energi på att försöka passa in, när det egentligen är våra olikheter som gör oss intressanta.

Man blir väldigt bra på att förstå människor när man själv vet hur det känns att känna sig utanför.

Det tog tid innan jag förstod att jag inte behövde välja mellan två identiteter. Jag fick bygga min egen. 

idag försöker jag inte passa in lika mycket längre. Jag försöker bara vara Filip.

videos.title: Eat THIS to Reduce Pain & Inflammation
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat THIS to Reduce Pain & Inflammation How can you overcome vitamin D deficiency on the carnivore diet without increasing your intake? Discover how the carnivore diet can improve gut health, insulin resistance, and chronic inflammation to improve vitamin D absorption and help optimize its benefits naturally.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4uWwxZJ

0:00 Introduction: Vitamin D and the carnivore diet 
1:01 Magnesium, zinc, vitamin K2, and D3
1:55 Other barriers to vitamin D absorption
2:11 Carnivore diet benefits 
3:19 Vitamin K2 benefits 
3:57 Cholesterol and vitamin D 
5:01 Vitamin D receptor resistance 
6:14 Carnivore diet results 

Keep watching for more on the carnivore diet and other ways to support gut health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/jZ4jNALF9Ys
▶️ https://youtu.be/zXd86RvNzZA
▶️ https://youtu.be/RCjQAQuWiYc

Many people notice major improvements on the carnivore diet, including reduced symptoms of autoimmune disease, less joint pain, improved mood, and better overall health.

Although beef, chicken, pork, and other meats are relatively low in vitamin D, the carnivore diet can still help correct vitamin D deficiency. Simply taking more vitamin D doesn’t always solve the problem.

Vitamin D depends on several important cofactors, including magnesium, zinc, vitamin K2, retinol, and cholesterol, the raw material used to make vitamin D in the body.

Vitamin D enters your cells through the vitamin D receptor. Vitamin D receptor resistance is very common, often caused by obesity, insulin resistance, and poor gut health.

Meat is a potent source of highly bioavailable nutrients, especially the cofactors needed for vitamin D. Many plant foods contain antinutrients that can interfere with nutrient absorption.
Vitamin D is made from cholesterol, so inadequate cholesterol intake can also impact vitamin D production.

The carnivore diet helps to reduce gut inflammation, increase autophagy, improve bile flow, reduce SIBO, and eliminate candida overgrowth, all of which support better vitamin D absorption and overall health.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Are Lambos ACTUALLY FAST? Urus v M5 DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Are Lambos ACTUALLY FAST? Urus v M5 DRAG RACE Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/seanysgarage for joining us for this race! 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-14-05

It’s time for a Lamborghini vs BMW showdown! 

We’ve got Mat in his BMW M5 Touring, and it’s going up against a Lamborghini Urus! The question is, will this hefty hybrid have what it takes to bring down the Lamborghini over the quarter-mile? Let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

Starting with the BMW, it’s powered by a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 coupled with an electric motor. Combined, they produce 727hp and 1,000Nm, and this power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic gearbox. It costs £116,160, and it tips the scales at 2,475kg! 

Then we have the Lamborghini. It’s powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8, and this puts down 650hp and 850Nm! It comes equipped with all-wheel drive, and it costs £172,500. What’s more, despite being an SUV, it’s a fair bit lighter than the BMW, weighing in at 2,200kg! 

So the BMW is up on power, but will the additional 300kg help the Urus snatch the win? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

BMW v Porsche v Audi v AMG drag race: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Drag-Race-14-05 Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/seanysgarage for joining us for this race! 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-14-05

It’s time for a Lamborghini vs BMW showdown! 

We’ve got Mat in his BMW M5 Touring, and it’s going up against a Lamborghini Urus! The question is, will this hefty hybrid have what it takes to bring down the Lamborghini over the quarter-mile? Let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

Starting with the BMW, it’s powered by a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 coupled with an electric motor. Combined, they produce 727hp and 1,000Nm, and this power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic gearbox. It costs £116,160, and it tips the scales at 2,475kg! 

Then we have the Lamborghini. It’s powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8, and this puts down 650hp and 850Nm! It comes equipped with all-wheel drive, and it costs £172,500. What’s more, despite being an SUV, it’s a fair bit lighter than the BMW, weighing in at 2,200kg! 

So the BMW is up on power, but will the additional 300kg help the Urus snatch the win? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

BMW v Porsche v Audi v AMG drag race: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Drag-Race-14-05

It's Eastern Conference Final Go Time for the Carolina Hurricanes ft. Mike Maniscalco It's an Eastern Conference Final Gameday for the Carolina Hurricanes as they take on the Montreal Canadiens in Game 1 on Thursday night. After almost two weeks of waiting, it's go time. Zach is joined by Hurricanes play-by-play and CanesCast co-host Mike Maniscalco to preview Game 1 and the ECF as a whole. On the Thursday Eastern Conference Final Crossover Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach & Mike begin the show by getting Mike's thoughts going into Game 1 for the Hurricanes. What makes this time different compared to others? What will he be watching out for in Game 1? Secondly, Zach & Mike discuss the series' storylines as a whole from Mike's perspective. Who could be the standouts and surprises for the Hurricanes? Finally, Zach concludes the show by giving his Canes to Click on who will score in Game 1 for the Hurricanes. Plus, he will share his thoughts on why the optimism is high for the Hurricanes in the Eastern Conference Final, especially in Game 1. videos.title: How Does An NHL Team Navigate A Grueling Travel Schedule With Luxury & Style? | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
How Does An NHL Team Navigate A Grueling Travel Schedule With Luxury & Style? | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DLLS Diehard and get access to premium content, our Discord channel, discounts on merch, and a free shirt! Sign up here: https://alldlls.com/join-diehard/

We have a very special guest in-studio today as we are joined by Jason “Stretch” Rademan, the Dallas Stars director of team services. Have you ever wondered about all the things that go on behind-the-scenes to get a National Hockey League team from city-to-city around North America for a grueling 41-game road schedule each season? Well, Stretch’s job is to make sure players, coaches and support staff are transported safely to the correct city, the right hotel and, of course, the intended NHL arena throughout their 6-7 month regular season - and hopefully a long playoff run. We will get all sorts of insights, stories and details from Stretch today!

videos.title: Texas Rangers’ Offense Finally Breaks Into Double-Digits In Rout Over Rockies | DLLS Rangers Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Texas Rangers’ Offense Finally Breaks Into Double-Digits In Rout Over Rockies | DLLS Rangers Podcast Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

The Texas Rangers played their best game of the season Tuesday night at Colorado, reaching double-digits for the first time and getting the best performance of Kumar Rocker’s career in a 10-0 win. The offense started early, with two runs in the first and three in the second. Brandon Nimmo, Ezequiel Duran and Joc Pederson had big nights. Rocker worked 7 2/3 innings, though not as the starter. Tyler Alexander served as the opener and worked a scoreless first inning as manager Skip Schumaker continued his trend of trying to do whatever it takes to jump-start the team.

01:30 Just The Facts - Injury Updates
5:00 Just the Facts - Series Recap
17:00 Great night for Skip Schumaker and Rangers Staff

videos.title: UK | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Training with Shavez
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Training with Shavez 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Avalanche Mistakes Lead to Golden Knights Goals in Game 1 Loss
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Mistakes Lead to Golden Knights Goals in Game 1 Loss Colorado Avalanche undone by self-inflicted wounds in Western Conference Finals Game 1. Despite a flurry of high-danger chances and 38 shots on net, the Avs fall 4-2 to the Vegas Golden Knights as costly mistakes and missed opportunities haunt their playoff run. Can the Avalanche regroup and find the discipline needed to turn the series in their favor?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Carter Hart’s stellar goaltending, Ross Colton’s controversial penalty, and Nathan MacKinnon’s highlight-reel assist that gave the Avalanche life. Discussions spotlight Vegas’ defensive structure, the Avs’ erratic shot accuracy, and the critical absence of Cale Makar. With Brett Kulak’s under-the-radar performance and Valeri Nichushkin’s creative goal, the episode explores what Colorado must adjust ahead of Game 2. Will the Avalanche capitalize on their chances next time, or are the Golden Knights in control of the series momentum?

videos.title: Hindi | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: The Problem With Constant Snacking
videos.summary_source_text:
The Problem With Constant Snacking Today’s food supply exposes the body to far more chemicals, additives, and processed ingredients than ever before. One of the simplest ways to lower that toxic load is not constantly eating throughout the day. Cutting out snacks and reducing how often food is consumed can significantly decrease the amount of toxins entering the body on a daily basis. Sometimes the healthiest change is not adding more, but finally giving the body a break.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.

As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Google’s New Omni And Spark Just Changed AI Forever Google just made its biggest AI move yet. Gemini 3.5 Flash is faster and cheaper than many frontier models, Gemini Omni brings realistic AI video creation and editing, Gemini Spark works in the background as a personal AI agent, and Antigravity turns coding into an agent-powered workflow. Google is no longer just adding AI to apps. It is turning Gemini into a full layer across Search, Chrome, YouTube, Docs, Android, and your digital life.

videos.title: Caleb Malhotra on NHL Draft Pressure, Manny Malhotra & Bulldogs Culture | Beyond the Crest
videos.summary_source_text:
Caleb Malhotra on NHL Draft Pressure, Manny Malhotra & Bulldogs Culture | Beyond the Crest Jeff Marek sits down with Brantford Bulldogs forward Caleb Malhotra — one of the top prospects for the NHL Draft 2026 — for an inside look at the mindset, family values, and habits shaping one of hockey's rising young stars.

Caleb opens up about leaning on his father Manny Malhotra for advice during the grind of a long season, managing pressure during his 2026 NHL Draft year, and why staying away from rankings and outside noise is part of his process. He also discusses the Bulldogs' culture, what makes the team special, and the sacrifices and support system behind the scenes that have helped him reach this point.

From stories about his family and siblings, to his relationship with the game, reading habits, basketball background, and his thoughts on coach Jay McKee, this conversation gives fans a closer look at the person behind the player and what drives him every day.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 — Intro
00:08 — Caleb on Manny Malhotra's advice during the season grind
00:57 — Keeping hockey fun throughout a long season
01:31 — Life away from the rink and balancing school
02:16 — Caleb's reading habits and getting closer to God
03:01 — Handling NHL Draft rankings and outside noise
04:08 — Caleb's draft goals and being compared to his dad
05:27 — Growing up around Manny Malhotra
06:14 — Family life and the Malhotra household
07:10 — Competition inside the family
08:03 — Basketball and other sports growing up
09:02 — Why the Bulldogs are successful
10:02 — Areas Caleb wants to improve
10:32 — Which teammate skill he would steal
11:18 — Bulldogs additions and championship expectations
12:16 — Thoughts on playing in the OHL
13:02 — Caleb on Bulldogs coach Jay McKee
13:58 — NHL fanbases and draft attention
14:32 — Final thoughts

videos.summary_source_text: Power Ranking Former Mavericks Coach Jason Kidd's BEST Quotes 😂 With the mutual parting of way between the Dallas Mavericks and former head coach Jason Kidd, we decided to revisit one of our favorite J-Kidd segments. Take a trip down memory lane with us as we power rank his best quotes from his time coaching Maverick greats including Cooper Flagg, Kyrie Irving and Luka Doncic. videos.title: How To Keep Momentum After Contact
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Keep Momentum After Contact The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Vårens bankforum 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Vårens bankforum 2026 Varmt välkommen till ett seminarium om aktuella frågor inom banksektorn!

Bankforum riktar sig till dig som arbetar inom banksektorn och är intresserad av att ta del av regelverksuppdateringar och andra relevanta branschnyheter. Under seminariet får vi lyssna till Martin Neisen från PwC Tyskland och hans erfarenheter kring risk och regelverk. Vi kommer även att gå igenom det nya AML-paketet, nytt utkast för portföljsäkringar av ränterisk enligt IFRS 9, incitamentsprogram och nyheter på skatteområdet.

PwC:s Bankforum är ett tillfälle att ta del av insikter i viktiga frågor som påverkar banksektorn. Varmt välkommen till ett seminarium om aktuella frågor inom banksektorn!

Google just dropped Gemini 3.5 Flash — and the numbers are insane. 4X faster than other frontier models, 72% fewer tokens used, a 1 MILLION token context window, and it BEATS Google's own Gemini 3.1 Pro on almost every benchmark. But does it actually beat ChatGPT, Claude, and Grok in the real world?

In this video, I break down everything you need to know about Gemini 3.5 Flash — what's new, the benchmark numbers nobody's talking about, real-world pricing, the limitations Google is hiding, and exactly which AI model you should actually use for your workflow in 2026.

By the end, you'll know if Gemini 3.5 Flash is hype or the real deal — and which use cases it actually wins at.

✅ 4X faster than other frontier models

✅ $1.50 / $9 per million tokens (cheaper than GPT-4 Turbo)

videos.summary_source_text:
This Simple Food Transforms Your Body in 5 Days What would happen if you ate only sardines for 5 days? This might sound extreme, but the results can be surprising.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4dHGVyz

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

With zero carbs and zero sugar, your body quickly shifts from burning sugar to burning fat. Within the first day, you begin producing ketones, a powerful fuel source that supports brain function and fat loss.

By the end of the five days, your body becomes more efficient at using fat for fuel, which can help stabilize energy levels throughout the day. Many people also notice reduced cravings and a stronger sense of control over their appetite. This kind of reset can give you insight into how your body responds to simple, nutrient-dense foods.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book "The Healthy Keto Plan" and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: Before You Take Turmeric Again, Watch This | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Before You Take Turmeric Again, Watch This | Dr. Mandell What if one of the most powerful natural compounds for calming inflammation has been sitting in your kitchen this whole time? In this video, I reveal how turmeric, and specifically its active compound curcumin, may help support a healthier inflammatory response throughout the body. Chronic inflammation has been linked to joint stiffness, aches, brain fog, fatigue, digestive issues, circulation problems, and accelerated aging. I’ll explain the physiology behind why inflammation makes you feel older, how turmeric works inside the body, and most importantly, how to absorb it properly so you actually get the benefits. If you wake up stiff, feel sluggish, or notice your body just doesn’t recover like it used to, this is something you’ll want to understand. Small daily habits can make a big difference when you calm inflammation at its source.

*********************************

videos.title: Google I/O 2026 Explained: Gemini 3.5, Omni, Spark & The Agent Takeover
videos.summary_source_text:
Google I/O 2026 Explained: Gemini 3.5, Omni, Spark & The Agent Takeover Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google I/O 2026 just changed the AI game — and most people are completely missing why. In this deep dive, I break down every major announcement from Google I/O 2026, from the new Gemini 3.5 Flash and Gemini Omni models to the agent platforms (Spark, Antigravity), the Universal Cart that shops for you, AI Studio's app-generation magic, and the creator tools reshaping Flow and Workspace.

By the end, you'll know exactly which features you can use TODAY, which to wait on, and which one is quietly going to change how you work.

🎯 WHAT YOU'LL LEARN:
✅ Why Gemini 3.5 Flash is a massive leap (1M token context, 4x faster inference)
✅ How Gemini Omni cracks character consistency in AI video generation
✅ What Gemini Spark actually does (and why it's not just another chatbot)
✅ How Universal Cart + AP2 protocol could replace your Amazon habit
✅ Why Google Antigravity is the "Xcode for AI agents"
✅ How AI Studio now generates full Android apps from a single prompt
✅ The $2M Build with Gemini XPRIZE Hackathon — and how to enter

⏱️ CHAPTERS:
00:00 The Moment Google Stopped Making Chatbots
01:22 Major AI Models: Gemini 3.5 and Gemini Omni
04:00 Agentic AI in Google Apps and Services
07:45 Shopping and Commerce: Universal Cart
10:21 Developer Tools: Antigravity, Gemini API, AI Studio
13:38 Media, Creativity and Workspace
15:15 Takeaways and What This Means

🔗 USEFUL LINKS:
- Google AI Studio: https://aistudio.google.com
- Gemini API Docs: https://ai.google.dev
- Google Antigravity: https://antigravity.google

videos.title: Jag tror på forskningen men har en aktiv fond som gått bra
videos.summary_source_text:
Jag tror på forskningen men har en aktiv fond som gått bra Av Europas globalfonder som låg i topp-kvartilen 2021 är 1,22 % kvar i topp-kvartilen 2025 — alltså en fond av åttiotvå. 35 % av topp-fonderna slogs ihop eller lades ned under perioden. Och kanske mest kontraintuitivt: 21 % av fonderna i botten-halvan 2015–2020 klättrade upp till topp-halvan 2020–2025, mer än de 16 % som faktiskt stannade kvar i toppen.

Det är ett av de starkaste argumenten för bred billig indexfond eller fondrobot framför att försöka välja "rätt" aktiv förvaltare.
Källa: S&P Dow Jones Indices, Europe Persistence Scorecard, år-slut 2025 (publicerad maj 2026). Rapporten täcker alla aktivt förvaltade fonder i Europa och rensar för survivorship bias.

#shorts #privatekonomi #ekonomi #fonder #indexfond #spara #investera #aktivforvaltning #fondrobot #börsen #pension #SPIVA Av Europas globalfonder som låg i topp-kvartilen 2021 är 1,22 % kvar i topp-kvartilen 2025 — alltså en fond av åttiotvå. 35 % av topp-fonderna slogs ihop eller lades ned under perioden. Och kanske mest kontraintuitivt: 21 % av fonderna i botten-halvan 2015–2020 klättrade upp till topp-halvan 2020–2025, mer än de 16 % som faktiskt stannade kvar i toppen.

Det är ett av de starkaste argumenten för bred billig indexfond eller fondrobot framför att försöka välja "rätt" aktiv förvaltare.
Källa: S&P Dow Jones Indices, Europe Persistence Scorecard, år-slut 2025 (publicerad maj 2026). Rapporten täcker alla aktivt förvaltade fonder i Europa och rensar för survivorship bias.

videos.title: The BEST Putter Odyssey Has Ever Made?
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST Putter Odyssey Has Ever Made? Rick Shiels gets his hands on the new Odyssey Damascus Milled Putters, and it's unlike anything Odyssey have released before. From the material to the feel to the price, this putter raises the bar for everyone else — and we break down exactly why.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.
Rick Shiels gets his hands on the new Odyssey Damascus Milled Putter Lineup, and it's unlike anything Odyssey have released before. From the material to the feel to the price, this putter raises the bar for everyone else — and we break down exactly why.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• Fix your golf downswing by mastering the two things your trail leg must do — move forward and rotate
• Master the Finish Line Drill — get your trail knee to the ball line before your hands
• Eliminate the stuck lower body move that kills the senior golf swing — for good
• Unlock hip rotation in the golf swing without lead-side feels — trail-side is easier and more effective
• Use the Fence Drill to keep your trail leg inside the toe line and stop standing up through impact
• Apply the add-on golf drill to feel your hips driving the downswing — just a club or a chair required
• Learn the lower body sequence that solved a decade of weight shift problems — in minutes

Eric Cogorno has coached golfers at every level and consistently finds that activating the trail side is the fastest path to better golf swing mechanics for players over 50. In this video, he breaks down trail leg function using real-time Swing Coach App golf swing analysis so you can see exactly what your lower body is doing — and fix it rep by rep. If you struggle with power, consistency, or weight shift, this is one of the most practical golf lessons you'll watch this year.

videos.title: Movement Is a Skill — Not Just Exercise
videos.summary_source_text:
Movement Is a Skill — Not Just Exercise Movement is not only about exercise. It is also a skill.
Just like learning an instrument or a language, the body can learn more efficient, coordinated, and comfortable ways of moving.
In this video, I explore why movement is a skill — and why this changes everything for people who have been trying to force progress through effort alone.

If you’d like to explore this more deeply, I’ve created a free guided somatic session here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass
 
If you’d like personal support, you’re welcome to book a one-on-one Zoom call with me here: https://calendly.com/taroiwamoto/45min

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

About Taro Iwamoto
I help self-aware adults who are exhausted by recurring pain, tension, and fear cycles despite everything they’ve tried, and who are ready to stop chasing fixes and follow a deeper somatic, nervous-system-based path to lasting change, so they can trust their body again and fully live their life with ease, freedom, and confidence.

Why Bitcoin Keeps FAILING at $80k Bitcoin is struggling to hold the $80k line, and it’s not random. In this video, Guy breaks down how spot Bitcoin ETF outflows, a sharp uptick in institutional selling, and worsening macro conditions are all driving the price lower—despite bullish news and headline-grabbing buys. You’ll see why retail optimism is getting crushed by real capital flows, what key chart levels to watch, and how big moves from players like Michael Saylor fit into the story.

videos.title: The MOST Dangerous Fat You’re Eating (It’s NOT Butter)
videos.summary_source_text:
The MOST Dangerous Fat You’re Eating (It’s NOT Butter) Many people consume these oils daily without realizing the potential long-term effects. If you care about your health, energy levels, and inflammation, this is something you need to understand.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/49jOhGf

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

The most dangerous fat you can put in your body isn’t butter, egg yolks, tallow, or even coconut oil. It’s something far more common: industrial seed oils like corn oil, soybean oil, canola oil, and cottonseed oil.

These oils are found in almost every restaurant meal, salad dressing, and processed food. They’re marketed as “heart-healthy,” but the truth is very different.

videos.title: David Coulthard On Finding The Best Seat In F1 | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast: Legends
videos.summary_source_text:
David Coulthard On Finding The Best Seat In F1 | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast: Legends The Formula 1 driver market is potentially just one domino away from exploding into a frenzy, so what exactly does an F1 driver need to do to get themselves into the best seat on the grid?

With multiple wins, poles and podiums throughout his 15 seasons at the pinnacle of motorsport, David Coulthard was often fighting at the front. But how did he make his way into the fastest cars?

Speaking to Tom Clarkson, David shares some of the remarkable tales from that journey – including his careful approach to getting a drive at Williams after the death of Ayrton Senna and why a ‘totally unnecessary’ contract dispute resulted in him leaving them for McLaren.

DC emphasises the importance of dealing with people, pressure and politics in navigating his way to the front of the grid. He reflects on how he negotiated with big team bosses like Ron Dennis, why he tried to use the media to his advantage and how surviving a plane crash changed his approach to life in F1.

videos.title: Did you know this about Tour Players clubs 🤯
videos.summary_source_text:
Did you know this about Tour Players clubs 🤯 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

videos.title: Porsche should be TERRIFIED of this NEW AMG!
videos.summary_source_text:
Porsche should be TERRIFIED of this NEW AMG! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-20-05

This is the new Mercedes-AMG GT 4-Door Coupe… and it’s gone ELECTRIC! 

Mat’s over in Germany getting hands-on with this all-new AMG, and he’s about to find out just how similar it is to last year’s AMG GT XX Concept. So let’s dive in… 

Starting with the exterior design, there’s no denying that on first impression, it’s clearly an evolution of the previous AMG GT 4-Door. Up front, there’s a huge grille, which in this instance includes LED ‘slats’ running across it. There’s an aggressive-looking front bumper, and the grille is flanked by updated headlights with the 3-pointed star design included in each. Along the side, there are 21-inch alloys and a sloping roofline that’s lower than the previous car. Around the back, there are yet more 3-pointed star lights, a large diffuser, and an active rear diffuser and spoiler! 

The inside of the car is distinctly an AMG. It comes with the AMG sports steering wheel with configurable driving modes, and there’s a huge digital driver's display and infotainment screen, as well as a third screen for the passenger. The cabin is incredibly well built with soft-touch or carbon fibre materials throughout, and the seats are solid yet incredibly comfortable. 

The new GT 4-Door Coupe comes with three electric motors that combine to produce an incredible 1,169hp at the top end! Even in its lowest setting, it can put down 1,000hp, so it’s an incredibly powerful beast. It comes with 106kWh batteries that were developed alongside the Mercedes F1 team, and it’s good for a range of 440 miles on a single charge. In terms of acceleration, it can hit 60mph in just 2.4 seconds - but that’s 0.1 seconds slower than the most powerful Porsche Taycan! 

In terms of price, the new GT 4-Door starts from around £120,000, rising up to around £190,000 for the top-of-the-range models! So is it set to be the best 4-door performance car money can buy? You’ll need to stick with Mat and see for yourself!

videos.title: UK | 19th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 19th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: CROSSOVER: A Ticket to the Stanley Cup Final Is On the Line for the Avalanche and Golden Knights
videos.summary_source_text:
CROSSOVER: A Ticket to the Stanley Cup Final Is On the Line for the Avalanche and Golden Knights The Vegas Golden Knights face off against the Colorado Avalanche in a high-stakes Western Conference Final packed with storylines and uncertainty. Can Jack Eichel and Mitch Marner overcome locker room drama, Mark Stone’s questionable health, and off-ice distractions—including John Tortorella’s infamous playoff fine—to carry Vegas past Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, and a stacked Avalanche squad?

Chris Micieli and Tony Cordasco break down goaltending battles between Carter Hart and Scott Wedgewood, dissect the impact of injuries and coaching pressure on both teams, and spotlight key contributors like Pavel Dorofeyev, Tomas Hertl, and Logan O’Connor. From special teams strategy to depth questions and X-factors, the series promises physicality, speed, and chess-like line matchups. Predictions fly as both hosts debate whose depth and resilience will decide this playoff showdown. Will Colorado’s window widen, or can Vegas defy the odds once again?

videos.title: Why So Many Heart Attacks Get Missed
videos.summary_source_text:
Why So Many Heart Attacks Get Missed Most heart attacks are not dramatic movie scenes with crushing chest pain. Many happen quietly, with symptoms people brush off as heartburn, indigestion, dizziness, or shortness of breath. That is why so many get missed until serious damage has already occurred. The biggest misconception is believing there will always be a clear warning sign before something serious happens. 

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1
